name: editpyxl

metadata.name: editpyxl
metadata.summary: A Python library to edit Excel 2007 xlsx/xlsm files

documentation:
editpyxl
========

editpyxl is a Python library to non-destructively edit Excel 2010 xlsx/xlsm files.

The purpose is to edit excel files without otherwise modifying the excel document, to allow for efficient and quick
edits of an excel file.

Many thanks to openpyxl for their hard work in developing a tool to read and writing excel files.
https://bitbucket.org/ericgazoni/openpyxl



Official documentation
======================

The homepage is http://editpyxl.readthedocs.org
You will find:

* every installation methods
* the official documentation
* code examples
* instructions for contributing


0.1.10
======

* Updated MutableSet import for python 3.10 compatibility

0.1.9
=====

* Force closing of zip file before removing folder, to prevent PermissionError: [WinError 32] error.

0.1.8
=====

* Added worksheet function clear_formula_values.  This deletes preset values in formulas to force recalculation, to
  solve issue in Excel 2016 not respecting force recalc flags or the absence of the calcChain.xml

0.1.5
=====

* Updated lxml writing for python3

0.1.4
=====

* Updated uuid1().get_hex() -> uuid1().hex

0.1.3
=====

* Added wb['sheetname'] notation.
* Added wb.sheetnames

0.1.2
=====

* Added ws['A1'] notation.

0.1.1
=====

* Added ws.dump() to dump all cell values.

0.1.0
=====

* Added wb.hide_sheet() / wb.unhide_sheet()

0.0.9 (unreleased)
==================

* Fixed filename parsing.

0.0.8 (unreleased)
==================

* Added function for updating formulas.

0.0.7 (unreleased)
==================

* Remove formulas from cells when setting value and remove calcChain.xml.

0.0.1 (unreleased)
==================

Initial Release
---------------

* Initial project released in Alpha.

classes.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.__getitem__
documentation: Convenience access by Excel style address

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.cell
documentation:
Return a cell for a coordinate.  Note - as of v2.0, openpyxl uses a 1-based row,col system, so row=1, col=1
is cell A1.

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.cell_to_row_col
documentation: Break an excel cell reference such as A1 into it's row and column components

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.clear_formula_values
documentation: Delete the populated value for any cell with a formula.

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.col_name
documentation: Convert excel column integer index to letter

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.col_number
documentation: Convert excel column letter to integer index

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.row_col_to_cell
documentation: Translate a row, col a cell reference.

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.cells_in_range
documentation:
Returns the cell name for each cell in a given range.  If include_2d=False, then ignore ranges which span
multiple rows and columns.  An individual cell will be returned as itself.  Multiple ranges will be parsed
if separated by a space.

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.validate_select_options
documentation:
If called, the worksheet will validate select options before they're set to ensure they are setting a correct
value.

methods.name: editpyxl.worksheet.Worksheet.dump
documentation: Dump all values from an excel sheet.
Sub-class for ExcelWorkbook, to allow similar interface to openpyxl, ie ws = wb.get_sheet_by_name('Sheet1')

classes.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.__getitem__
documentation: Convenience access for sheet names

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.active
documentation: Get the active sheet

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.active
documentation: Set the active sheet

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.close
documentation: Delete the xml-uuid path and all files in it.

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.get_sheet_by_name
documentation: Load an excel sheet with the specific sheet name.  If the shared strings is not loaded, load this as well.

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.get_sheet_names
documentation: Return a list of sheet names

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.hide_sheet
documentation: Hide an excel sheet.

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.unhide_sheet
documentation: Unhide an excel sheet.

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.load_XML
documentation: Load an xml file.  Assumes the filename has been opened, or exists in the zip file.

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.load_defined_names
documentation:
Load values for defined names in a workbook.

Note - ignores defined_names for matricies to avoid large data and complex ranges for print ranges.  Could
also filter on name = _xlnm.Print_Area.

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.open
documentation: Open an excel file (xlsx or xlsm) and load the string table and workbook xmls.

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.remove_from_zip
documentation:
Remove a file from a zip.  Required to overwrite a file in an existing archive.  Since ZipFile lacks the
ability, this basically creates a new zip file without the files.

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.sheet_filename
documentation: Find an excel sheet filename, i.e. translate a sheet name into the correct xl/worksheet/sheet1.xml

methods.name: editpyxl.workbook.Workbook.save
documentation: Update the loaded zip file and save back to an excel file.

Fast XML interface to editing an excel workbook.  Limited in ability to update (can't create new cells), but
but designed to be fast and efficient.  API mirrors openpyxl where possible.

classes.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell

methods.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell.clear_formula_value
documentation:
If a cell contains populated value where it has a formula, delete the value.  Used to force excel to rebuild
all formulas.

methods.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell.get_shared_string
documentation: Update a shared string from the shared string table and return the value.  Used by cell().

methods.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell.set_shared_string
documentation: Update a shared string from the shared string table and return the value.  Used by cell().

methods.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell.formula
documentation: Value of a formula is the value of the cell

methods.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell.formula
documentation: Update an excel formula, but don't change the value.

methods.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell.select
documentation: Value of select list comes from the string table in the same manner as a normal string

methods.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell.select
documentation: Update an excel cell and return the value.  If value is not specified, return the current cell value.

methods.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell.value
documentation: Get the value of a cell.

methods.name: editpyxl.cell.Cell.value
documentation: Update an excel cell and return the value.  If value is not specified, return the current cell value.
Sub-class for ExcelWorksheet, to allow similar interface to openpyxl, ie ws.cell().value
